title: lathyrus friedrichsthalii var. skorpili
intro: Lathyrus friedrichsthalii var. skorpili, also known as Balkan lathyris, is a type of wild pea or vetch plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus friedrichsthalii var. skorpili include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
